creator: danm@prime.gushi.org
text:
On Fri, 31 Jul 2009, Mark Linimon wrote:

> Is this problem particular to dns/bind96, or does it apply to the ports
> framework itself?

Good question.  I'd previously only encountered it on bind ports (not just 
96), but from a discussion with others, it could in theory affect other 
ports which do the same thing.  I shall go and try it with 
openssh-portable:

make: don't know how to make 
/usr/ports/security/openssh-portable/work/.build_done.openssh._usr_local. 
Stop
*** Error code 2

Stop in /usr/ports/security/openssh-portable.

Yes, it affects multiple ports which do this.

-Dan
